variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A appears in the operating section above financial lines. The selected parent row is 'Selling and administrative expenses', and there is no separate same-level D&A line to add. XRD is empty, so there is also no visible R&D D&A row to consider.
